isolation.details: No external HTTP requests found. All 3 https:// URLs are store URLs in CTA onclick handler (https://play.google.com/store) which are permitted. The single new Image() call is used only to load assets from the ASSETS dictionary, which contains exclusively data: URIs (Base64 inline PNG images). No fetch(), XMLHttpRequest, external

externalRequests.newImageContext: Used only with ASSETS dictionary containing data: URIs (Base64)

interaction.details: Both touch AND mouse events are properly implemented. Touch events (touchstart, touchmove, touchend) with preventDefault() and passive:false for proper mobile handling. Mouse events (mousedown, mousemove, mouseup) for desktop fallback. All 6 event listeners use addEventListener on the canvas element. A resize event listener is also present for responsive scaling.
touchEvents: touchstart (line 91) - onDown handler with e.preventDefault(), passive:false
touchmove (line 92) - onMove handler with e.preventDefault(), passive:false
touchend (line 93) - onUp handler with e.preventDefault(), passive:false

cta.details: CTA implementation is complete with INSTALL NOW button, store URL, mraid.open with window.open fallback, and proper trigger condition (game result after 2.3 seconds). WARNING: Store URL is generic (https://play.google.com/store) without a specific app ID. This needs to be replaced with the actual app store listing URL before production deployment. No Apple App Store URL is provided.

storeUrl.reason: Generic store URL without specific app package ID (e.g., /store/apps/details?id=com.example.app)

triggers: Game result state (victory or defeat) after 2.3 second delay triggers showCTA()
Timer expiration (MAX_T=45 seconds) triggers result -> CTA
Player base destroyed (pbhp<=0) triggers result -> CTA
All 3 waves cleared triggers result -> CTA (victory=true)

size.details: File size is 296,503 bytes (289.6 KB). Well within all ad network limits. Uses requestAnimationFrame for proper game loop. Canvas dimensions are 540x960 (mobile portrait, 9:16 aspect ratio). Responsive scaling via window resize listener.

qualityChecks.gameFlow: PASS - Complete state machine: loading -> title -> wave_intro -> playing -> wave_clear (loops for 3 waves) -> result -> cta. All 7 states handled in both update() and render() switch blocks. Title auto-advances after 2.8s or on tap. Wave intro lasts 1.5s. Wave clear lasts 1.9s. Result lasts 2.3s before CTA.
qualityChecks.webAudio: PASS - Full WebAudio implementation using AudioContext/webkitAudioContext. Oscillator-based sound effects: sDep() (deploy, 220Hz square), sHit() (noise burst), sDeath() (noise + 140Hz sawtooth), sCoin() (660Hz+880Hz sine sequence), sArr() (880Hz arrow), sBase() (60Hz sawtooth), sWC() (C-E-G arpeggio), sVic() (C-E-G-C victory fanfare). Uses createOscillator, createGain, createBuffer for noise synthesis. All wrapped in try/catch for graceful degradation.
qualityChecks.particles: PASS - Particle system with 150-object pool (pre-allocated). Functions: sp() (spawn single particle), sparks() (radial burst), burst() (enemy/ally death), coinFX() (gold coin floating), baseBlast() (22-particle explosion with 3 colors). Particles have position, velocity, lifetime, color, and size. Pool-based for zero allocation during gameplay.
qualityChecks.lanes: PASS - 3 lanes defined: LANE_YS=[250,450,650]. Lane detection via laneOf() function (nearest-lane snap). Enemy spawning distributes across all 3 lanes randomly. Lane dividers rendered as dashed lines in the playing state. Battlefield area bounded by BF_TOP=60 and BF_BOT=800.
qualityChecks.dragDeploy: PASS - Complete drag-and-drop troop deployment. onDown() checks card bounds and gold cost, creates drag object. onMove() updates ghost position. onUp() validates battlefield placement, snaps to nearest lane, spawns unit, deducts gold cost. Ghost rendering during drag shows unit preview. Tutorial overlay guides first deployment.
qualityChecks.economy: PASS - Gold economy system: starting gold=30 (wave 1), bonus gold on wave clear (+20/+30), earn gold on enemy kill (+10). Troop costs: swordsman=10, archer=20. Gold displayed in HUD. Card affordability check before drag initiation. Wave clear shows '+20 GOLD BONUS!' text. Gold balance persists across waves.
qualityChecks.waves: PASS - 3 waves defined in LEVELS array. Wave 1: 3 soldiers (hp:40, atk:8). Wave 2: 4 soldiers + 1 elite (hp:80, atk:15). Wave 3: 3 soldiers + 2 elites + 1 boss. Progressive difficulty with increasing enemy counts and types. Archer unlocked in wave 2 (alock:true in wave 1, false in wave 2+). Each wave has starting gold and bonus gold settings.
qualityChecks.boss: PASS - Boss unit defined in wave 3: {t:'boss', n:1, hp:300, a:25, s:20, iv:99, d:7.0}. Boss unit type has stats: hp:300, atk:25, spd:20, range:42, ranged:false, size:72 (largest unit). Boss appears at 7.0 seconds into wave 3. Boss has dedicated sprite (ikey:'boss') and color (#660066 purple). Boss is melee with high HP and damage.

infoItems: File is 289.6 KB - excellent for all ad networks
10 inline Base64 PNG assets (map, player, tower, enemy, boss, wall, arrow, coin, shadow, star)
Full WebAudio sound system with 8 distinct sound effects
150-object particle pool for zero-allocation visual effects
Tutorial overlay for first-time player guidance
Delta time capped at 50ms to prevent physics jumps
Responsive canvas scaling on window resize
mraid.open with window.open fallback chain for cross-network compatibility
Max game timer of 45 seconds ensures bounded play session
recommendations: REQUIRED: Replace generic store URL (https://play.google.com/store) with actual app listing URL (e.g., https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.company.armyclash) before deployment
RECOMMENDED: Add Apple App Store URL (apps.apple.com) for iOS users, or implement platform detection to route to the correct store
OPTIONAL: Consider adding haptic feedback via navigator.vibrate() for mobile deployment impact
OPTIONAL: Add mraid.js SDK detection for richer ad network integration (e.g., mraid.isViewable(), mraid.getState())
INFO: File size (289.6 KB) leaves significant room for additional sprite assets or effects if needed
